modules.name: dbpoolpy.config
documentation:
Settings and configuration for dbpoolpy.

Read values from the module specified by the DBPOOLPY_SETTINGS_MODULE environment
variable, and then from dbpoolpy.conf.default; see the default_settings.py
for a list of all possible variables.
coding:utf-8

classes.name: dbpoolpy.config.ImproperlyConfigured
documentation: 不当配置

classes.name: dbpoolpy.config.SettingsReference
documentation:
String subclass which references a current settings value. It's treated as
the value in memory but serializes to a settings.NAME attribute reference.

classes.name: dbpoolpy.config.LazySettings

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.LazySettings._setup
documentation:
Load the settings module pointed to by the environment variable. This
is used the first time settings are needed, if the user hasn't
configured settings manually.

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.LazySettings.__getattr__
documentation: Return the value of a setting and cache it in self.__dict__.

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.LazySettings.__setattr__
documentation:
Set the value of setting. Clear all cached values if _wrapped changes
(@override_settings does this) or clear single values when set.

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.LazySettings.__delattr__
documentation: Delete a setting and clear it from cache if needed.

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.LazySettings.configure
documentation:
Called to manually configure the settings. The 'default_settings'
parameter sets where to retrieve any unspecified values from (its
argument must support attribute access (__getattr__)).

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.LazySettings._add_script_prefix
documentation:
Add SCRIPT_NAME prefix to relative paths.

Useful when the app is being served at a subpath and manually prefixing
subpath to STATIC_URL and MEDIA_URL in settings is inconvenient.

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.LazySettings.configured
documentation: Return True if the settings have already been configured.

A lazy proxy for either global DBPOOLPY settings or a custom settings object.
The user can manually configure settings prior to using them. Otherwise,
DBPOOLPY uses the settings module pointed to by DBPOOLPY_SETTINGS_MODULE.

classes.name: dbpoolpy.config.UserSettingsHolder

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.UserSettingsHolder.__init__
documentation:
Requests for configuration variables not in this class are satisfied
from the module specified in default_settings (if possible).
Holder for user configured settings.

classes.name: dbpoolpy.dbhelper.sqlite3.SQLite3Helper
documentation: SQLite3帮助类

classes.name: dbpoolpy.dbhelper.mysql.MysqlHelper
documentation: Mysql帮助类

functions.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.lazy
documentation:
Turn any callable into a lazy evaluated callable. result classes or types
is required -- at least one is needed so that the automatic forcing of
the lazy evaluation code is triggered. Results are not memoized; the
function is evaluated on every access.

functions.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.lazystr
documentation: Shortcut for the common case of a lazy callable that returns str.

functions.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.keep_lazy
documentation:
A decorator that allows a function to be called with one or more lazy
arguments. If none of the args are lazy, the function is evaluated
immediately, otherwise a __proxy__ is returned that will evaluate the
function when needed.

functions.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.keep_lazy_text
documentation: A decorator for functions that accept lazy arguments and return text.

functions.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.unpickle_lazyobject
documentation:
Used to unpickle lazy objects. Just return its argument, which will be the
wrapped object.

functions.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.partition
documentation:
Split the values into two sets, based on the return value of the function
(True/False). e.g.:

    >>> partition(lambda x: x > 3, range(5))
    [0, 1, 2, 3], [4]

classes.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.cached_property

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.cached_property.__get__
documentation:
Call the function and put the return value in instance.__dict__ so that
subsequent attribute access on the instance returns the cached value
instead of calling cached_property.__get__().

Decorator that converts a method with a single self argument into a
property cached on the instance.

A cached property can be made out of an existing method:
(e.g. `url = cached_property(get_absolute_url)`).
The optional `name` argument is obsolete as of Python 3.6 and will be
deprecated in DBPOOLPY 4.0 (#30127).

classes.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.classproperty
documentation:
Decorator that converts a method with a single cls argument into a property
that can be accessed directly from the class.

classes.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.Promise
documentation:
Base class for the proxy class created in the closure of the lazy function.
It's used to recognize promises in code.

classes.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.LazyObject

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.LazyObject._setup
documentation: Must be implemented by subclasses to initialize the wrapped object.

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.LazyObject.__reduce__
documentation: Because we have messed with __class__ below, we confuse pickle as to what
class we are pickling. We're going to have to initialize the wrapped
object to successfully pickle it, so we might as well just pickle the
wrapped object since they're supposed to act the same way.
Unfortunately, if we try to simply act like the wrapped object, the ruse
will break down when pickle gets our id(). Thus we end up with pickle
thinking, in effect, that we are a distinct object from the wrapped
object, but with the same __dict__. This can cause problems (see #25389).
So instead, we define our own __reduce__ method and custom unpickler. We
pickle the wrapped object as the unpickler's argument, so that pickle
will pickle it normally, and then the unpickler simply returns its
argument.

A wrapper for another class that can be used to delay instantiation of the
wrapped class.

By subclassing, you have the opportunity to intercept and alter the
instantiation. If you don't need to do that, use SimpleLazyObject.

classes.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.SimpleLazyObject

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.SimpleLazyObject.__init__
documentation:
Pass in a callable that returns the object to be wrapped.

If copies are made of the resulting SimpleLazyObject, which can happen
in various circumstances within DBPOOLPY, then you must ensure that the
callable can be safely run more than once and will return the same
value.

methods.name: dbpoolpy.config.functional.SimpleLazyObject.__repr__
documentation: Return a meaningful representation of the lazy object for debugging
without evaluating the wrapped object.

A lazy object initialized from any function.

Designed for compound objects of unknown type. For builtins or objects of
known type, use dbpoolpy.config.functional.lazy.

methods.name: dbpoolpy.dbhelper.Base.field2sql
documentation:
字段名解析
情况:'id','a.id','id as i', 'a.id as ai'

methods.name: dbpoolpy.dbhelper.Base.fields2sql
documentation:
解析fields
情况: 'id, a.name, imlf.phone as ip',
      ['id', 'a.name', 'imlf.phone as ip'],
      ('id', 'a.name', 'imlf.phone as ip')

methods.name: dbpoolpy.dbhelper.Base.table2sql
documentation:
字段名解析
情况:'graphs','imlf.graphs','graphs as g', 'imlf.graphs as ig'

methods.name: dbpoolpy.dbhelper.Base.tables2sql
documentation:
解析tables
情况: 'graphs, imlf.nodes, imlf.graphs as ig',
       ['graphs', 'imlf.nodes', 'imlf.graphs as ig'],
       ('graphs', 'imlf.nodes', 'imlf.graphs as ig')

methods.name: dbpoolpy.dbhelper.DBHelper.query
documentation:
sql查询，返回查询结果
sql: 要执行的sql语句
args: 要传入的参数
isdict: 返回值格式是否为dict, 默认True
hashead: 如果isdict为Fasle, 返回的列表中是否包含列标题

args: 传参
isdict: 返回值是否是dict

methods.name: dbpoolpy.dbhelper.DBHelper.insert_batch
documentation:
分批插入数据库
parameters:
    table: str, 表名
    data: List(dict), 要插入的数据
    batch: int, 每批的数量

methods.name: dbpoolpy.dbhelper.DBHelper.update_batch
documentation:
分批修改数据库
parameters:
    table: str, 表名
    many_values: List(dict), values
    many_where: List(dict), values对应的where, 要和many_values的长度一样长
    batch: int, 每批的数量
